title: dracocephalum teucrioides
intro: Dracocephalum teucrioides, also known as blue dragon or dragon's head, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mint family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, alleviate respiratory problems, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Dracocephalum teucrioides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses, with some cultures also using it in cooking and as a natural dye.
